beefy.context: So you open Obsidian and begin drafting beefy spec docs that describe the feature in your head with impressive detail.
beefy.context_line: So you open Obsidian and begin drafting beefy spec docs that describe the feature in your head with impressive detail.

cover.context: It’s not until I opened up the full codebase and read its latest state cover to cover that I began to see what we theorized and hoped was only a diminishing artifact of earlier models: slop.
cover.context_line: It’s not until I opened up the full codebase and read its latest state cover to cover that I began to see what we theorized and hoped was only a diminishing artifact of earlier models: slop.

eager.context: Opus on the other hand is much more eager - great for smaller edits - not so good for larger features or refactors, it often doesn’t read the whole file or misses parts and then delivers inefficient outcomes or misses sth.
eager.context_line: Opus on the other hand is much more eager - great for smaller edits - not so good for larger features or refactors, it often doesn’t read the whole file or misses parts and then delivers inefficient outcomes or misses sth.

occur.context: Template compilation could occur before runtime — allowing errors to be caught earlier in the development lifecycle模板编译可以在运行时之前发生，从而可以在开发生命周期中更早地发现错误。

drifts.context: Simpler than worktrees because drifts on main are easy to reconcile.
drifts.context_line: Simpler than worktrees because drifts on main are easy to reconcile.

manner.context: In real life, design docs and specs are living documents that evolve in a volatile manner through discovery and implementation.
manner.context_line: In real life, design docs and specs are living documents that evolve in a volatile manner through discovery and implementation.

largely.context: Serious engineers using AI to do real work and not just weekend projects largely also follow a predictable development arc.
largely.context_line: Serious engineers using AI to do real work and not just weekend projects largely also follow a predictable development arc.

therapy.context: I’ve been seeking therapy and slowly trying to learn about myself and symptoms as well as learning to manage my life with ADHD
therapy.context_line: I’ve been seeking therapy and slowly trying to learn about myself and symptoms as well as learning to manage my life with ADHD

symptoms.context: Given that I’m 18, I want to dedicate myself to mange my symptoms before I grow further into adulthood.
symptoms.context_line: Given that I’m 18, I want to dedicate myself to mange my symptoms before I grow further into adulthood.

plausible.context: What’s worse is code that agents write looks plausible and impressive while it’s being written and presented to you.

ramblings.context: If you wanna hear more ramblings and ideas how to build in this new world, follow me on Twitter.

retrieved.context: manages sessions so answers can be retrieved later.
retrieved.context_line: manages sessions so answers can be retrieved later.

slightest.context: Go wasn’t something I gave even the slightest thought even a few months ago, but eventually I played around and found that agents are really great at writing it, and its simple type system makes linting fast.
slightest.context_line: Go wasn’t something I gave even the slightest thought even a few months ago, but eventually I played around and found that agents are really great at writing it, and its simple type system makes linting fast.

bewildered.context: It was pure, unadulterated slop. I was bewildered.
bewildered.context_line: It was pure, unadulterated slop. I was bewildered.

compromise.context: The “you should have caught it anyway” is s face saving compromise that you should take.
compromise.context_line: The “you should have caught it anyway” is s face saving compromise that you should take.

cumulative.context: After reading months of cumulative highly-specified agentic code, I said to myself: I’m not shipping this shit.
